rationale: Educ. Code §31.076 concerns commissioner rulemaking and finality of decisions under its subchapter; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 31.076. RULES; FINALITY OF DECISIONS. (a) The commissioner may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. The cited education provision governs commissioner decisions and does not reference property tax homestead exemptions.
